Vision Plus Beat Pro

The BEST Way to experience powerful, portable sound.
Equipped with advanced audio technology, the Beat Pro delivers crisp, rich, and immersive sound, making it perfect for any music lover or audiophile. Whether you're hosting a party or relaxing at home, the Vision Plus Beat Pro promises an unforgettable listening experience, elevating your music to a whole new level.

It optimizes sound quality by providing features like surround sound, volume leveling, and enhanced dialogue clarity, ensuring a more dynamic and engaging listening experience.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner left_padding_desktop=”2%” constrain_group_101=”yes” right_padding_desktop=”2%” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/3″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” column_padding_type=”advanced” gradient_type=”default”][vc_custom_heading text=”TWS Pairing Mode” font_container=”tag:h2|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff”][vc_column_text]TWS (True Wireless Stereo) mode allows two Beat Pro’s to pair together and play audio simultaneously, creating a true stereo sound experience. Instead of both speakers playing the same mono audio, one speaker functions as the left channel and the other as the right channel, providing a more immersive and dynamic listening experience.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/3″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”Karaoke Mode” font_container=”tag:h2|text_align:left|color:%23ffffff”][vc_column_text]Karaoke Mode on The Beat Pro speaker allows users to sing along with their favorite songs by connecting a microphone to the speaker. Quality Audio

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

MUSIC THAT GIVES A PUNCH

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text max_width=”400″]

Experience and enjoy solid and clear sound on 12W output power that brings out the intensity and soul of your music. It has enough volume to spread the tunes in every direction, and a bass that delivers punchy tones, giving your music life.

[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line” custom_height=”40px” custom_height_phone=”70vh”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” left_padding_desktop=”6%” constrain_group_2=”yes” right_padding_desktop=”6%” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all” css=”.vc_custom_1668784389289{background-image: url(https://visionplus.co.ke/wp-content/uploads/2022/11/Built-To-Survive.jpg?id=24003) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” centered_text=”true” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” column_padding_type=”default” gradient_type=”default”][divider line_type=”No Line” custom_height=”90px”][vc_column_text]

Splash-Proof

BUILT TO SURVIVE

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text max_width=”600″]

The speaker is made from quality, durable, and water-resistant materials with an IP66 rating, ensuring you enjoy listening to music at the pool or by the beach. Encounter a water spill? Just wipe and continue with the thrills.

seo.title: Buy Portable Audio | Vision Plus | Affordable Portable Audio
seo.description: Experience musical brilliance with Vision plus portable audio range. Our portable audios are water resistant and have TWS connectivity. Enjoy discounts now!
